results.title: Acme Corp - About Us
results.content: Acme Corp is a leading manufacturer of widgets, founded in 2015. We serve 500+ enterprise clients worldwide with a team of 150 employees.

results.title: Acme Corp Raises $20M Series B - TechCrunch
results.content: Widget manufacturer Acme Corp announced a $20M Series B round led by Sequoia Capital. The company plans to expand its AI-powered manufacturing line.

results.title: Acme Corp Reviews - G2
results.content: Acme Corp uses React frontend, Python backend, and AWS infrastructure according to their engineering blog.
